HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

32class Triangle {
33 private:
34 // --- data ---
35 std::vector<rvec *> nodes;
36 std::vector<int> domainIndeces;
37 rvec normalVector;
38 double surfaceArea;
39 double perimeter;
40 double I1;
41 double I2s[3];
42 double I2d[3];
43 rvec center;
44
45 public:
46 // ---------------- Constructors & basic setup ----------------
53 Triangle(rvec *n1, rvec *n2, rvec *n3, int dIndex1, int dIndex2);
54
59 Triangle(rvec *n1, rvec *n2, rvec *n3);
60
62 Triangle(){};
63
69 int AssignNodes(rvec *n1, rvec *n2, rvec *n3);
70
77 int SetDomainIndeces(int dIndex1, int dIndex2);
78
83 int CalculateGeometryData();
84
89 int Invert();
90
91 // ---------------- Accessors ----------------
97 rvec Node(int index);
98
104 rvec *NodePtr(int index);
105
111 int DomainPosition(int dIndex);
112
117 rvec RefNormalVector();
118
124 rvec FBNormalVector(int side);
125
130 double Area();
131
136 double Perimeter();
137
142 rvec Center();
143
148 std::pair<int, int> BorderingIndeces();
149
154 double IntRR();
155
161 int SwitchIndex(int n1, int n2);
162
163 // ---------------- Adjacency / common entities ----------------
169 int FindAdjacency(Triangle *T);
170
176 std::pair<int, int> FindCommonEdgeIndices(Triangle *T);
177
183 std::pair<int, int> FindCommonVertexIndices(Triangle *T);
184
191 int FindAdjacency(Triangle *T, rvec t);
192
193 // ---------------- Point-in-triangle test ----------------
204 bool containsPoint(const rvec &p, double tol = 1e-6);
205
212 double clean(double x, double eps = 1e-10) {
213 return std::abs(x) < eps ? 0.0 : x;
214 }
215
216 // ---------------- Analytic self-integrals ----------------
221 double getI1();
222
228 double getI2(rvec *r);
229
235 double getI2(rvec *r1, rvec *r2);
236
243 double getI2Translated(rvec r1, rvec r2, rvec t);
244};
